DTEval 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

    dt.brd

    dt.brd.Rd

    Bradford diffusion tube data set, 2020 to 2025 subset of tube measurements collected at sites classified as valid for roadside sampling using the AQSR sampling scheme.

    dt.brd

    Format

    A (11273x11) 'data.frame' object

    site

    Site identifier code

    site_name

    Site name/description

    year_of_measurement

    Year the measurement was made (numeric, YYYY)

    month

    Month the measurement was made (character, 3-letter abbreviation)

    month_numeric

    Month the measurement was made (numeric, 1-12)

    latitude

    Latitude of site

    longitude

    Longitude of site

    local_authority

    Local Authority making these measurements

    bias_adjusted_measurement

    The bias adjusted NO2 measurement

    .start_date

    Sampling start date (Date, YYYY-MM-DD)

    .end_date

    Sampling end date (Date, YYYY-MM-DD)

    Source

    Bradford City Council

    Note

    Start and end dates of individual diffusion tube sampling periods (.start_date and .end_date) based of Defra Sampling Calendar, see dt.calendar.

    Examples

    head(dt.brd)
#>     site
#> 1 DT214A
#> 2 DT214B
#> 3 DT214C
#> 4 DT214B
#> 5 DT214C
#> 6 DT214A
#>                                                                            site_name
#> 1 Post outside 221 Bierley Lane near junction with Rockhill Lane opp layby enterance
#> 2 Post outside 221 Bierley Lane near junction with Rockhill Lane opp layby enterance
#> 3 Post outside 221 Bierley Lane near junction with Rockhill Lane opp layby enterance
#> 4 Post outside 221 Bierley Lane near junction with Rockhill Lane opp layby enterance
#> 5 Post outside 221 Bierley Lane near junction with Rockhill Lane opp layby enterance
#> 6 Post outside 221 Bierley Lane near junction with Rockhill Lane opp layby enterance
#>   year_of_measurement month month_numeric latitude longitude local_authority
#> 1                2022   Apr             4 53.75975  -1.73278        bradford
#> 2                2022   Apr             4 53.75975  -1.73278        bradford
#> 3                2022   Apr             4 53.75975  -1.73278        bradford
#> 4                2022   Aug             8 53.75975  -1.73278        bradford
#> 5                2022   Aug             8 53.75975  -1.73278        bradford
#> 6                2022   Dec            12 53.75975  -1.73278        bradford
#>   bias_adjusted_measurement .start_date  .end_date
#> 1                   15.9818  2022-03-30 2022-05-04
#> 2                   17.1790  2022-03-30 2022-05-04
#> 3                   13.4726  2022-03-30 2022-05-04
#> 4                   18.7124  2022-08-03 2022-08-31
#> 5                   15.6702  2022-08-03 2022-08-31
#> 6                   26.4942  2022-11-30 2023-01-04

    Contents
